16 For God loved the world in this way:[a] He gave his one and only Son,(A) so that everyone who believes in him will not perish but have eternal life. 17 For God did not send his Son into the world to condemn the world, but to save the world through him.

Footnotes

  1. John 3:16 Or For God loved the world so much that he gave

Cross references

  1. John 3:16 : Rom 5:8
